title: SC-002 requires p95 latency, but verification records only mean latency
claim: The packet marks SC-002 shipped even though the benchmark helper computes mean and the summary table reports mean, not p95 latency.
counterevidenceSought: Checked tasks.md T008, implementation-summary latency table, and benchmark helper/test body for percentile computation or recorded p95 output; none was present.
alternativeExplanation: REQ-003 only asks for a recorded benchmark, but SC-002 explicitly names p95, so the stricter success criterion remains unproven.
downgradeTrigger: Downgrade to P2 after a p95 benchmark row is recorded or SC-002 is amended to match the mean-latency evidence.
